message:
fix(fr-store): emit "expired" event when EXPIREAT causes immediate deletion

When EXPIREAT/PEXPIREAT is called with a timestamp in the past, Redis
immediately deletes the key. Previously we emitted a "del" event with
NOTIFY_GENERIC, but this is incorrect - Redis emits an "expired" event
with NOTIFY_EXPIRED in this case since the key expired (not deleted).

Closes frankenredis-g69j

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
